items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes, the quiz and your score are 100% free. The complete PDF report with in-depth analysis and action plan is paid (from €12.90).

items.question: Is my data confidential?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your answers are anonymized and never shared. We comply with GDPR and your data is stored in Europe.

items.question: Does my partner need to take the test too?
items.answer: No, you can take the test alone. The quiz evaluates your perception of the relationship. For an even more complete analysis, you can each take it separately and compare.

items.question: What's included in the full report?
items.answer: The PDF report (15 pages) includes: detailed analysis of 7 dimensions, relationship strengths, risk areas, comparison with other couples, and a personalized AI-generated action plan.

items.question: Is there a guarantee?
items.answer: Yes, full refund within 7 days, no questions asked.

footer.tagline: Understand your relationship. Change what matters.
